---
title: "Solving Static Oligopoly Pricing Model"
author: ""
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    toc: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  daemon: false
---

## Introduction

This file is a placeholder scaffold for the static oligopoly pricing solver report.

## Next Steps

Implement the full document by following `problems/solve_opm/solve_opm.qmd` and mirroring the structure in `scripts/solve_mdp/solve_mdp.qmd`.
